title: CopilotApi
description: Describes all JSON-RPC methods exposed by the Copilot CLI server. SDK codegen tools consume this to produce typed client wrappers.

ping.description: Checks server responsiveness and returns protocol information.

params.description: Optional message to echo back to the caller.

result.description: Server liveness response, including the echoed message, current timestamp, and protocol version.

connect.description: Performs the SDK server connection handshake and validates the optional connection token.

params.description: Optional connection token presented by the SDK client during the handshake.

result.description: Handshake result reporting the server's protocol version and package version on success.

list.description: Lists Copilot models available to the authenticated user.

params.description: Optional GitHub token used to list models for a specific user instead of the global auth context.

result.description: List of Copilot models available to the resolved user, including capabilities and billing metadata.

list.description: Lists built-in tools available for a model.

params.description: Optional model identifier whose tool overrides should be applied to the listing.

result.description: Built-in tools available for the requested model, with their parameters and instructions.

getQuota.description: Gets Copilot quota usage for the authenticated user or supplied GitHub token.

params.description: Optional GitHub token used to look up quota for a specific user instead of the global auth context.

result.description: Quota usage snapshots for the resolved user, keyed by quota type.

list.description: Lists MCP servers from user configuration.

result.description: User-configured MCP servers, keyed by server name.

add.description: Adds an MCP server to user configuration.

params.description: MCP server name and configuration to add to user configuration.

update.description: Updates an MCP server in user configuration.

params.description: MCP server name and replacement configuration to write to user configuration.

remove.description: Removes an MCP server from user configuration.

params.description: MCP server name to remove from user configuration.

enable.description: Enables MCP servers in user configuration for new sessions.

params.description: MCP server names to enable for new sessions.

disable.description: Disables MCP servers in user configuration for new sessions.

params.description: MCP server names to disable for new sessions.

discover.description: Discovers MCP servers from user, workspace, plugin, and builtin sources.

params.description: Optional working directory used as context for MCP server discovery.

result.description: MCP servers discovered from user, workspace, plugin, and built-in sources.

setDisabledSkills.description: Replaces the global list of disabled skills.

params.description: Skill names to mark as disabled in global configuration, replacing any previous list.

discover.description: Discovers skills across global and project sources.

params.description: Optional project paths and additional skill directories to include in discovery.

result.description: Skills discovered across global and project sources.

setProvider.description: Registers an SDK client as the session filesystem provider.

params.description: Initial working directory, session-state path layout, and path conventions used to register the calling SDK client as the session filesystem provider.

result.description: Indicates whether the calling client was registered as the session filesystem provider.

fork.description: Creates a new session by forking persisted history from an existing session.

params.description: Source session identifier to fork from, optional event-ID boundary, and optional friendly name for the new session.

result.description: Identifier and optional friendly name assigned to the newly forked session.

suspend.description: Suspends the session while preserving persisted state for later resume.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

getStatus.description: Gets authentication status and account metadata for the session.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

result.description: Authentication status and account metadata for the session.

getCurrent.description: Gets the currently selected model for the session.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

result.description: The currently selected model for the session.

switchTo.description: Switches the session to a model and optional reasoning configuration.

reasoningEffort.description: Reasoning effort level to use for the model. "none" disables reasoning.

reasoningSummary.description: Reasoning summary mode to request for supported model clients

modelCapabilities.description: Override individual model capabilities resolved by the runtime

params.description: Target model identifier and optional reasoning effort, summary, and capability overrides.
params.title: ModelSwitchToRequest

result.description: The model identifier active on the session after the switch.

get.description: Gets the current agent interaction mode.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

result.description: The agent mode. Valid values: "interactive", "plan", "autopilot".

set.description: Sets the current agent interaction mode.

params.description: Agent interaction mode to apply to the session.
params.title: ModeSetRequest

params.description: Identifies the target session.

result.description: The session's friendly name, or null when not yet set.

name.description: New session name (1–100 characters, trimmed of leading/trailing whitespace)

params.description: New friendly name to apply to the session.
params.title: NameSetRequest

read.description: Reads the session plan file from the workspace.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

result.description: Existence, contents, and resolved path of the session plan file.

update.description: Writes new content to the session plan file.

content.description: The new content for the plan file

params.description: Replacement contents to write to the session plan file.
params.title: PlanUpdateRequest

delete.description: Deletes the session plan file from the workspace.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

getWorkspace.description: Gets current workspace metadata for the session.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

result.description: Current workspace metadata for the session, or null when not available.

listFiles.description: Lists files stored in the session workspace files directory.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

result.description: Relative paths of files stored in the session workspace files directory.

readFile.description: Reads a file from the session workspace files directory.

path.description: Relative path within the workspace files directory

params.description: Relative path of the workspace file to read.
params.title: WorkspacesReadFileRequest

result.description: Contents of the requested workspace file as a UTF-8 string.

createFile.description: Creates or overwrites a file in the session workspace files directory.

path.description: Relative path within the workspace files directory

content.description: File content to write as a UTF-8 string

params.description: Relative path and UTF-8 content for the workspace file to create or overwrite.
params.title: WorkspacesCreateFileRequest

getSources.description: Gets instruction sources loaded for the session.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

result.description: Instruction sources loaded for the session, in merge order.

start.description: Starts fleet mode by submitting the fleet orchestration prompt to the session.

prompt.description: Optional user prompt to combine with fleet instructions

params.description: Optional user prompt to combine with the fleet orchestration instructions.
params.title: FleetStartRequest

result.description: Indicates whether fleet mode was successfully activated.

list.description: Lists custom agents available to the session.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

result.description: Custom agents available to the session.

getCurrent.description: Gets the currently selected custom agent for the session.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

result.description: The currently selected custom agent, or null when using the default agent.

select.description: Selects a custom agent for subsequent turns in the session.

name.description: Name of the custom agent to select

params.description: Name of the custom agent to select for subsequent turns.
params.title: AgentSelectRequest

result.description: The newly selected custom agent.

deselect.description: Clears the selected custom agent and returns the session to the default agent.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

reload.description: Reloads custom agent definitions and returns the refreshed list.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

result.description: Custom agents available to the session after reloading definitions from disk.

startAgent.description: Starts a background agent task in the session.

name.description: Short name for the agent, used to generate a human-readable ID

params.description: Agent type, prompt, name, and optional description and model override for the new task.
params.title: TasksStartAgentRequest

result.description: Identifier assigned to the newly started background agent task.

list.description: Lists background tasks tracked by the session.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

result.description: Background tasks currently tracked by the session.

promoteToBackground.description: Promotes an eligible synchronously-waited task so it continues running in the background.

params.description: Identifier of the task to promote to background mode.
params.title: TasksPromoteToBackgroundRequest

result.description: Indicates whether the task was successfully promoted to background mode.

params.description: Identifier of the background task to cancel.
params.title: TasksCancelRequest

result.description: Indicates whether the background task was successfully cancelled.

remove.description: Removes a completed or cancelled background task from tracking.

params.description: Identifier of the completed or cancelled task to remove from tracking.
params.title: TasksRemoveRequest

result.description: Indicates whether the task was removed. False when the task does not exist or is still running/idle.

sendMessage.description: Sends a message to a background agent task.

message.description: Message content to send to the agent

fromAgentId.description: Agent ID of the sender, if sent on behalf of another agent

params.description: Identifier of the target agent task, message content, and optional sender agent ID.
params.title: TasksSendMessageRequest

result.description: Indicates whether the message was delivered, with an error message when delivery failed.

list.description: Lists skills available to the session.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

result.description: Skills available to the session, with their enabled state.

enable.description: Enables a skill for the session.

name.description: Name of the skill to enable

params.description: Name of the skill to enable for the session.
params.title: SkillsEnableRequest

disable.description: Disables a skill for the session.

name.description: Name of the skill to disable

params.description: Name of the skill to disable for the session.
params.title: SkillsDisableRequest

reload.description: Reloads skill definitions for the session.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

result.description: Diagnostics from reloading skill definitions, with warnings and errors as separate lists.

list.description: Lists MCP servers configured for the session and their connection status.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

result.description: MCP servers configured for the session, with their connection status.

enable.description: Enables an MCP server for the session.

serverName.description: Name of the MCP server to enable

params.description: Name of the MCP server to enable for the session.
params.title: McpEnableRequest

disable.description: Disables an MCP server for the session.

serverName.description: Name of the MCP server to disable

params.description: Name of the MCP server to disable for the session.
params.title: McpDisableRequest

reload.description: Reloads MCP server connections for the session.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

login.description: Starts OAuth authentication for a remote MCP server.

serverName.description: Name of the remote MCP server to authenticate

forceReauth.description: When true, clears any cached OAuth token for the server and runs a full new authorization. Use when the user explicitly wants to switch accounts or believes their session is stuck.

clientName.description: Optional override for the OAuth client display name shown on the consent screen. Applies to newly registered dynamic clients only — existing registrations keep the name they were created with. When omitted, the runtime applies a neutral fallback; callers driving interactive auth should pass their own surface-specific label so the consent screen matches the product the user sees.

callbackSuccessMessage.description: Optional override for the body text shown on the OAuth loopback callback success page. When omitted, the runtime applies a neutral fallback; callers driving interactive auth should pass surface-specific copy telling the user where to return.

params.description: Remote MCP server name and optional overrides controlling reauthentication, OAuth client display name, and the callback success-page copy.
params.title: McpOauthLoginRequest

result.description: OAuth authorization URL the caller should open, or empty when cached tokens already authenticated the server.

list.description: Lists plugins installed for the session.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

result.description: Plugins installed for the session, with their enabled state and version metadata.

list.description: Lists extensions discovered for the session and their current status.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

result.description: Extensions discovered for the session, with their current status.

enable.description: Enables an extension for the session.

params.description: Source-qualified extension identifier to enable for the session.
params.title: ExtensionsEnableRequest

disable.description: Disables an extension for the session.

params.description: Source-qualified extension identifier to disable for the session.
params.title: ExtensionsDisableRequest

reload.description: Reloads extension definitions and processes for the session.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

handlePendingToolCall.description: Provides the result for a pending external tool call.

requestId.description: Request ID of the pending tool call

result.description: Tool call result (string or expanded result object)

error.description: Error message if the tool call failed

params.description: Pending external tool call request ID, with the tool result or an error describing why it failed.
params.title: HandlePendingToolCallRequest

result.description: Indicates whether the external tool call result was handled successfully.

list.description: Lists slash commands available in the session.

includeSkills.description: Include enabled user-invocable skills and commands

includeClientCommands.description: Include commands registered by protocol clients, including SDK clients and extensions

params.description: Optional filters controlling which command sources to include in the listing.
params.title: CommandsListRequest

result.description: Slash commands available in the session, after applying any include/exclude filters.

invoke.description: Invokes a slash command in the session.

name.description: Command name. Leading slashes are stripped and the name is matched case-insensitively.

input.description: Raw input after the command name

params.description: Slash command name and optional raw input string to invoke.
params.title: CommandsInvokeRequest

result.description: Result of invoking the slash command (text output, prompt to send to the agent, or completion).

handlePendingCommand.description: Reports completion of a pending client-handled slash command.

requestId.description: Request ID from the command invocation event

error.description: Error message if the command handler failed

params.description: Pending command request ID and an optional error if the client handler failed.
params.title: CommandsHandlePendingCommandRequest

result.description: Indicates whether the pending client-handled command was completed successfully.

respondToQueuedCommand.description: Responds to a queued command request from the session.

requestId.description: Request ID from the queued command event

result.description: Result of the queued command execution

params.description: Queued command request ID and the result indicating whether the client handled it.
params.title: CommandsRespondToQueuedCommandRequest

result.description: Indicates whether the queued-command response was accepted by the session.

elicitation.description: Requests structured input from a UI-capable client.

message.description: Message describing what information is needed from the user

requestedSchema.description: JSON Schema describing the form fields to present to the user

params.description: Prompt message and JSON schema describing the form fields to elicit from the user.
params.title: UIElicitationRequest

result.description: The elicitation response (accept with form values, decline, or cancel)

handlePendingElicitation.description: Provides the user response for a pending elicitation request.

requestId.description: The unique request ID from the elicitation.requested event

result.description: The elicitation response (accept with form values, decline, or cancel)

params.description: Pending elicitation request ID and the user's response (accept/decline/cancel + form values).
params.title: UIHandlePendingElicitationRequest

result.description: Indicates whether the elicitation response was accepted; false if it was already resolved by another client.

handlePendingPermissionRequest.description: Provides a decision for a pending tool permission request.

requestId.description: Request ID of the pending permission request

result.description: Decision to apply to a pending permission request.

params.description: Pending permission request ID and the decision to apply (approve/reject and scope).
params.title: PermissionDecisionRequest

result.description: Indicates whether the permission decision was applied; false when the request was already resolved.

setApproveAll.description: Enables or disables automatic approval of tool permission requests for the session.

enabled.description: Whether to auto-approve all tool permission requests

params.description: Whether to auto-approve all tool permission requests for the rest of the session.
params.title: PermissionsSetApproveAllRequest

result.description: Indicates whether the operation succeeded.

params.description: No parameters; clears all session-scoped tool permission approvals.
params.title: PermissionsResetSessionApprovalsRequest

result.description: Indicates whether the operation succeeded.

log.description: Emits a user-visible session log event.

level.description: Log severity level. Determines how the message is displayed in the timeline. Defaults to "info".

ephemeral.description: When true, the message is transient and not persisted to the session event log on disk

url.description: Optional URL the user can open in their browser for more details

params.description: Message text, optional severity level, persistence flag, and optional follow-up URL.
params.title: LogRequest

result.description: Identifier of the session event that was emitted for the log message.

exec.description: Starts a shell command and streams output through session notifications.

cwd.description: Working directory (defaults to session working directory)

params.description: Shell command to run, with optional working directory and timeout in milliseconds.
params.title: ShellExecRequest

result.description: Identifier of the spawned process, used to correlate streamed output and exit notifications.

kill.description: Sends a signal to a shell process previously started via "shell.exec".

params.description: Identifier of a process previously returned by "shell.exec" and the signal to send.
params.title: ShellKillRequest

result.description: Indicates whether the signal was delivered; false if the process was unknown or already exited.

compact.description: Compacts the session history to reduce context usage.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

result.description: Compaction outcome with the number of tokens and messages removed and the resulting context window breakdown.

truncate.description: Truncates persisted session history to a specific event.

eventId.description: Event ID to truncate to. This event and all events after it are removed from the session.

params.description: Identifier of the event to truncate to; this event and all later events are removed.
params.title: HistoryTruncateRequest

result.description: Number of events that were removed by the truncation.

getMetrics.description: Gets accumulated usage metrics for the session.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

result.description: Accumulated session usage metrics, including premium request cost, token counts, model breakdown, and code-change totals.

enable.description: Enables remote session export or steering.

mode.description: Per-session remote mode. "off" disables remote, "export" exports session events to GitHub without enabling remote steering, "on" enables both export and remote steering.

params.description: Optional remote session mode ("off", "export", or "on"); defaults to enabling both export and remote steering.
params.title: RemoteEnableRequest

result.description: GitHub URL for the session and a flag indicating whether remote steering is enabled.

disable.description: Disables remote session export and steering.

params.description: Identifies the target session.

readFile.description: Reads a file from the client-provided session filesystem.

params.description: Path of the file to read from the client-provided session filesystem.
params.title: SessionFsReadFileRequest

result.description: File content as a UTF-8 string, or a filesystem error if the read failed.

writeFile.description: Writes a file in the client-provided session filesystem.

mode.description: Optional POSIX-style mode for newly created files

params.description: File path, content to write, and optional mode for the client-provided session filesystem.
params.title: SessionFsWriteFileRequest

anyOf.description: Describes a filesystem error.

result.description: Describes a filesystem error.

appendFile.description: Appends content to a file in the client-provided session filesystem.

mode.description: Optional POSIX-style mode for newly created files

params.description: File path, content to append, and optional mode for the client-provided session filesystem.
params.title: SessionFsAppendFileRequest

anyOf.description: Describes a filesystem error.

result.description: Describes a filesystem error.

exists.description: Checks whether a path exists in the client-provided session filesystem.

params.description: Path to test for existence in the client-provided session filesystem.
params.title: SessionFsExistsRequest

result.description: Indicates whether the requested path exists in the client-provided session filesystem.

stat.description: Gets metadata for a path in the client-provided session filesystem.

params.description: Path whose metadata should be returned from the client-provided session filesystem.
params.title: SessionFsStatRequest

result.description: Filesystem metadata for the requested path, or a filesystem error if the stat failed.

mkdir.description: Creates a directory in the client-provided session filesystem.

mode.description: Optional POSIX-style mode for newly created directories

params.description: Directory path to create in the client-provided session filesystem, with options for recursive creation and POSIX mode.
params.title: SessionFsMkdirRequest

anyOf.description: Describes a filesystem error.

result.description: Describes a filesystem error.

readdir.description: Lists entry names in a directory from the client-provided session filesystem.

params.description: Directory path whose entries should be listed from the client-provided session filesystem.
params.title: SessionFsReaddirRequest

result.description: Names of entries in the requested directory, or a filesystem error if the read failed.

readdirWithTypes.description: Lists directory entries with type information from the client-provided session filesystem.

params.description: Directory path whose entries (with type information) should be listed from the client-provided session filesystem.
params.title: SessionFsReaddirWithTypesRequest

result.description: Entries in the requested directory paired with file/directory type information, or a filesystem error if the read failed.

rm.description: Removes a file or directory from the client-provided session filesystem.

recursive.description: Remove directories and their contents recursively

force.description: Ignore errors if the path does not exist

params.description: Path to remove from the client-provided session filesystem, with options for recursive removal and force.
params.title: SessionFsRmRequest

anyOf.description: Describes a filesystem error.

result.description: Describes a filesystem error.

rename.description: Renames or moves a path in the client-provided session filesystem.

params.description: Source and destination paths for renaming or moving an entry in the client-provided session filesystem.
params.title: SessionFsRenameRequest

anyOf.description: Describes a filesystem error.

result.description: Describes a filesystem error.

sqlite.description: Executes a SQLite query against a per-session database in the client-provided session filesystem.

queryType.description: How to execute the query: 'exec' for DDL/multi-statement (no results), 'query' for SELECT (returns rows), 'run' for INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE (returns rowsAffected)

params.description: Optional named bind parameters
Database name, SQL query, query type, and optional bind parameters for executing a SQLite query against a per-session database.
params.title: SessionFsSqliteRequest

result.description: Query results including rows, columns, and rows affected, or a filesystem error if execution failed.

gitHubToken.description: GitHub token for per-user quota lookup. When provided, resolves this token to determine the user's quota instead of using the global auth.

AccountGetQuotaRequest.description: Optional GitHub token used to look up quota for a specific user instead of the global auth context.
AccountGetQuotaRequest.title: AccountGetQuotaRequest

quotaSnapshots.description: Quota snapshots keyed by type (e.g., chat, completions, premium_interactions)

AccountGetQuotaResult.description: Quota usage snapshots for the resolved user, keyed by quota type.
AccountGetQuotaResult.title: AccountGetQuotaResult

isUnlimitedEntitlement.description: Whether the user has an unlimited usage entitlement

entitlementRequests.description: Number of requests included in the entitlement

usedRequests.description: Number of requests used so far this period

usageAllowedWithExhaustedQuota.description: Whether usage is still permitted after quota exhaustion

overage.description: Number of overage requests made this period

overageAllowedWithExhaustedQuota.description: Whether overage is allowed when quota is exhausted

resetDate.description: Date when the quota resets (ISO 8601 string)

agent.description: Currently selected custom agent, or null if using the default agent

AgentGetCurrentResult.description: The currently selected custom agent, or null when using the default agent.
AgentGetCurrentResult.title: AgentGetCurrentResult

name.description: Unique identifier of the custom agent

path.description: Absolute local file path of the agent definition. Only set for file-based agents loaded from disk; remote agents do not have a path.

AgentList.description: Custom agents available to the session.
AgentList.title: AgentList

AgentReloadResult.description: Custom agents available to the session after reloading definitions from disk.
AgentReloadResult.title: AgentReloadResult

name.description: Name of the custom agent to select

AgentSelectRequest.description: Name of the custom agent to select for subsequent turns.
AgentSelectRequest.title: AgentSelectRequest

CommandList.description: Slash commands available in the session, after applying any include/exclude filters.
CommandList.title: CommandList

requestId.description: Request ID from the command invocation event

error.description: Error message if the command handler failed

CommandsHandlePendingCommandRequest.description: Pending command request ID and an optional error if the client handler failed.
CommandsHandlePendingCommandRequest.title: CommandsHandlePendingCommandRequest

success.description: Whether the command was handled successfully

CommandsHandlePendingCommandResult.description: Indicates whether the pending client-handled command was completed successfully.
CommandsHandlePendingCommandResult.title: CommandsHandlePendingCommandResult

name.description: Command name. Leading slashes are stripped and the name is matched case-insensitively.

input.description: Raw input after the command name

CommandsInvokeRequest.description: Slash command name and optional raw input string to invoke.
CommandsInvokeRequest.title: CommandsInvokeRequest

includeSkills.description: Include enabled user-invocable skills and commands

includeClientCommands.description: Include commands registered by protocol clients, including SDK clients and extensions

CommandsListRequest.description: Optional filters controlling which command sources to include in the listing.
CommandsListRequest.title: CommandsListRequest

requestId.description: Request ID from the queued command event

result.description: Result of the queued command execution

CommandsRespondToQueuedCommandRequest.description: Queued command request ID and the result indicating whether the client handled it.
CommandsRespondToQueuedCommandRequest.title: CommandsRespondToQueuedCommandRequest

success.description: Whether the response was accepted (false if the requestId was not found or already resolved)

CommandsRespondToQueuedCommandResult.description: Indicates whether the queued-command response was accepted by the session.
CommandsRespondToQueuedCommandResult.title: CommandsRespondToQueuedCommandResult

token.description: Connection token; required when the server was started with COPILOT_CONNECTION_TOKEN

ConnectRequest.description: Optional connection token presented by the SDK client during the handshake.
ConnectRequest.title: ConnectRequest

ConnectResult.description: Handshake result reporting the server's protocol version and package version on success.
ConnectResult.title: ConnectResult

CurrentModel.description: The currently selected model for the session.
CurrentModel.title: CurrentModel

name.description: Server name (config key)

type.description: Server transport type: stdio, http, sse, or memory (local configs are normalized to stdio)

enabled.description: Whether the server is enabled (not in the disabled list)

DiscoveredMcpServerType.description: Server transport type: stdio, http, sse, or memory (local configs are normalized to stdio)
DiscoveredMcpServerType.title: DiscoveredMcpServerType

mimeType.description: MIME type of the blob content

blob.description: Base64-encoded binary content of the resource

mimeType.description: MIME type of the text content

name.description: Extension name (directory name)

status.description: Current status: running, disabled, failed, or starting

pid.description: Process ID if the extension is running

extensions.description: Discovered extensions and their current status

ExtensionList.description: Extensions discovered for the session, with their current status.
ExtensionList.title: ExtensionList

ExtensionsDisableRequest.description: Source-qualified extension identifier to disable for the session.
ExtensionsDisableRequest.title: ExtensionsDisableRequest

ExtensionsEnableRequest.description: Source-qualified extension identifier to enable for the session.
ExtensionsEnableRequest.title: ExtensionsEnableRequest

ExtensionStatus.description: Current status: running, disabled, failed, or starting
ExtensionStatus.title: ExtensionStatus

anyOf.description: Simple string tool result
Expanded external tool result payload

ExternalToolResult.description: Tool call result (string or expanded result object)
ExternalToolResult.title: ExternalToolResult

textResultForLlm.description: Text result returned to the model

resultType.description: Execution outcome classification. Optional for back-compat; normalized to 'success' (or 'failure' when error is present) when missing or unrecognized.

error.description: Optional error message for failed executions

sessionLog.description: Detailed log content for timeline display

items.description: A content block within a tool result, which may be text, terminal output, image, audio, or a resource

contents.description: Structured content blocks from the tool

anyOf.description: Plain text content block
Terminal/shell output content block with optional exit code and working directory
Image content block with base64-encoded data
Audio content block with base64-encoded data
Resource link content block referencing an external resource
Embedded resource content block with inline text or binary data

ExternalToolTextResultForLlmContent.description: A content block within a tool result, which may be text, terminal output, image, audio, or a resource
ExternalToolTextResultForLlmContent.title: ExternalToolTextResultForLlmContent

mimeType.description: MIME type of the audio (e.g., audio/wav, audio/mpeg)

ExternalToolTextResultForLlmContentAudio.description: Audio content block with base64-encoded data
ExternalToolTextResultForLlmContentAudio.title: ExternalToolTextResultForLlmContentAudio

mimeType.description: MIME type of the image (e.g., image/png, image/jpeg)

ExternalToolTextResultForLlmContentImage.description: Image content block with base64-encoded data
ExternalToolTextResultForLlmContentImage.title: ExternalToolTextResultForLlmContentImage

resource.description: The embedded resource contents, either text or base64-encoded binary

ExternalToolTextResultForLlmContentResou.description: Embedded resource content block with inline text or binary data
ExternalToolTextResultForLlmContentResou.title: ExternalToolTextResultForLlmContentResource

ExternalToolTextResultForLlmContentResou.description: The embedded resource contents, either text or base64-encoded binary
ExternalToolTextResultForLlmContentResou.title: ExternalToolTextResultForLlmContentResourceDetails

name.description: Resource name identifier

title.description: Human-readable display title for the resource

mimeType.description: MIME type of the resource content

size.description: Size of the resource in bytes

ExternalToolTextResultForLlmContentResou.description: Resource link content block referencing an external resource
ExternalToolTextResultForLlmContentResou.title: ExternalToolTextResultForLlmContentResourceLink

src.description: URL or path to the icon image

mimeType.description: MIME type of the icon image

theme.description: Theme variant this icon is intended for

ExternalToolTextResultForLlmContentResou.description: Theme variant this icon is intended for
ExternalToolTextResultForLlmContentResou.title: ExternalToolTextResultForLlmContentResourceLinkIconTheme

exitCode.description: Process exit code, if the command has completed

cwd.description: Working directory where the command was executed

ExternalToolTextResultForLlmContentTermi.description: Terminal/shell output content block with optional exit code and working directory

sourcePath.description: File path relative to repo or absolute for home

location.description: Where this source lives — used for UI grouping

applyTo.description: Glob pattern from frontmatter — when set, this instruction applies only to matching files

items.description: MCP server name used as a configuration key.

items.description: MCP server name used as a configuration key.

names.description: Names of MCP servers to enable. Each server is removed from the persisted disabled list so new sessions spawn it. Unknown or already-enabled names are ignored.

workingDirectory.description: Working directory used as context for discovery (e.g., plugin resolution)

servers.description: MCP servers discovered from all sources

McpEnableRequest.title: McpEnableRequest

serverName.description: Name of the remote MCP server to authenticate

forceReauth.description: When true, clears any cached OAuth token for the server and runs a full new authorization. Use when the user explicitly wants to switch accounts or believes their session is stuck.

clientName.description: Optional override for the OAuth client display name shown on the consent screen. Applies to newly registered dynamic clients only — existing registrations keep the name they were created with. When omitted, the runtime applies a neutral fallback; callers driving interactive auth should pass their own surface-specific label so the consent screen matches the product the user sees.

callbackSuccessMessage.description: Optional override for the body text shown on the OAuth loopback callback success page. When omitted, the runtime applies a neutral fallback; callers driving interactive auth should pass surface-specific copy telling the user where to return.

McpOauthLoginRequest.description: Remote MCP server name and optional overrides controlling reauthentication, OAuth client display name, and the callback success-page copy.
McpOauthLoginRequest.title: McpOauthLoginRequest

authorizationUrl.description: URL the caller should open in a browser to complete OAuth. Omitted when cached tokens were still valid and no browser interaction was needed — the server is already reconnected in that case. When present, the runtime starts the callback listener before returning and continues the flow in the background; completion is signaled via session.mcp_server_status_changed.

McpOauthLoginResult.description: OAuth authorization URL the caller should open, or empty when cached tokens already authenticated the server.
McpOauthLoginResult.title: McpOauthLoginResult

name.description: Server name (config key)

status.description: Connection status: connected, failed, needs-auth, pending, disabled, or not_configured

source.description: Configuration source: user, workspace, plugin, or builtin

error.description: Error message if the server failed to connect

anyOf.description: Local MCP server configuration launched as a child process.

tools.description: Tools to include. Defaults to all tools if not specified.

type.description: Remote transport type. Defaults to "http" when omitted.

filterMapping.description: Content filtering mode to apply to all tools, or a map of tool name to content filtering mode.

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for tool calls to this server.

headers.description: HTTP headers to include in requests to the remote MCP server.

kind.description: Agent prompt result discriminator

prompt.description: Prompt to submit to the agent

displayPrompt.description: Prompt text to display to the user

runtimeSettingsChanged.description: True when the invocation mutated user runtime settings; consumers caching settings should refresh

kind.description: Completed result discriminator

message.description: Optional user-facing message describing the completed command

runtimeSettingsChanged.description: True when the invocation mutated user runtime settings; consumers caching settings should refresh

name.description: Canonical command name without a leading slash

kind.description: Coarse command category for grouping and behavior: runtime built-in, skill-backed command, or SDK/client-owned command

allowDuringAgentExecution.description: Whether the command may run while an agent turn is active

hint.description: Hint to display when command input has not been provided

required.description: When true, the command requires non-empty input; clients should render the input hint as required

completion.description: Optional completion hint for the input (e.g. 'directory' for filesystem path completion)

preserveMultilineInput.description: When true, clients should pass the full text after the command name as a single argument rather than splitting on whitespace

SlashCommandInputCompletion.description: Optional completion hint for the input (e.g. 'directory' for filesystem path completion)
SlashCommandInputCompletion.title: SlashCommandInputCompletion

SlashCommandInvocationResult.description: Result of invoking the slash command (text output, prompt to send to the agent, or completion).
SlashCommandInvocationResult.title: SlashCommandInvocationResult

SlashCommandKind.description: Coarse command category for grouping and behavior: runtime built-in, skill-backed command, or SDK/client-owned command
SlashCommandKind.title: SlashCommandKind

kind.description: Text result discriminator

text.description: Text output for the client to render

preserveAnsi.description: Whether ANSI sequences should be preserved

runtimeSettingsChanged.description: True when the invocation mutated user runtime settings; consumers caching settings should refresh

toolCallId.description: Tool call ID associated with this agent task

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the task

startedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the task was started

completedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the task finished

activeTimeMs.description: Accumulated active execution time in milliseconds

activeStartedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the current active period began

error.description: Error message when the task failed

agentType.description: Type of agent running this task

result.description: Result text from the task when available

model.description: Model used for the task when specified

executionMode.description: How the agent is currently being managed by the runtime

canPromoteToBackground.description: Whether the task is currently in the original sync wait and can be moved to background mode. False once it is already backgrounded, idle, finished, or no longer has a promotable sync waiter.

latestResponse.description: Most recent response text from the agent

idleSince.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the agent entered idle state

TaskAgentInfoExecutionMode.description: How the agent is currently being managed by the runtime
TaskAgentInfoExecutionMode.title: TaskAgentInfoExecutionMode

TaskAgentInfoStatus.description: Current lifecycle status of the task
TaskAgentInfoStatus.title: TaskAgentInfoStatus

TaskList.description: Background tasks currently tracked by the session.
TaskList.title: TaskList

TasksCancelRequest.description: Identifier of the background task to cancel.
TasksCancelRequest.title: TasksCancelRequest

cancelled.description: Whether the task was successfully cancelled

TasksCancelResult.description: Indicates whether the background task was successfully cancelled.
TasksCancelResult.title: TasksCancelResult

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the task

startedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the task was started

completedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the task finished

attachmentMode.description: Whether the shell runs inside a managed PTY session or as an independent background process

executionMode.description: Whether the shell command is currently sync-waited or background-managed

canPromoteToBackground.description: Whether this shell task can be promoted to background mode

logPath.description: Path to the detached shell log, when available

TaskShellInfoAttachmentMode.description: Whether the shell runs inside a managed PTY session or as an independent background process
TaskShellInfoAttachmentMode.title: TaskShellInfoAttachmentMode

TaskShellInfoExecutionMode.title: TaskShellInfoExecutionMode

TaskShellInfoStatus.description: Current lifecycle status of the task
TaskShellInfoStatus.title: TaskShellInfoStatus

TasksPromoteToBackgroundRequest.description: Identifier of the task to promote to background mode.
TasksPromoteToBackgroundRequest.title: TasksPromoteToBackgroundRequest

promoted.description: Whether the task was successfully promoted to background mode

TasksPromoteToBackgroundResult.description: Indicates whether the task was successfully promoted to background mode.
TasksPromoteToBackgroundResult.title: TasksPromoteToBackgroundResult

TasksRemoveRequest.description: Identifier of the completed or cancelled task to remove from tracking.
TasksRemoveRequest.title: TasksRemoveRequest

removed.description: Whether the task was removed. Returns false if the task does not exist or is still running/idle (cancel it first).

TasksRemoveResult.description: Indicates whether the task was removed. False when the task does not exist or is still running/idle.
TasksRemoveResult.title: TasksRemoveResult

message.description: Message content to send to the agent

fromAgentId.description: Agent ID of the sender, if sent on behalf of another agent

TasksSendMessageRequest.description: Identifier of the target agent task, message content, and optional sender agent ID.
TasksSendMessageRequest.title: TasksSendMessageRequest

sent.description: Whether the message was successfully delivered or steered

TasksSendMessageResult.description: Indicates whether the message was delivered, with an error message when delivery failed.
TasksSendMessageResult.title: TasksSendMessageResult

name.description: Short name for the agent, used to generate a human-readable ID

TasksStartAgentRequest.description: Agent type, prompt, name, and optional description and model override for the new task.
TasksStartAgentRequest.title: TasksStartAgentRequest

agentId.description: Generated agent ID for the background task

TasksStartAgentResult.description: Identifier assigned to the newly started background agent task.
TasksStartAgentResult.title: TasksStartAgentResult

name.description: Tool identifier (e.g., "bash", "grep", "str_replace_editor")

namespacedName.description: Optional namespaced name for declarative filtering (e.g., "playwright/navigate" for MCP tools)

description.description: Description of what the tool does

parameters.description: JSON Schema for the tool's input parameters

instructions.description: Optional instructions for how to use this tool effectively

tools.description: List of available built-in tools with metadata

ToolList.title: ToolList

model.description: Optional model ID — when provided, the returned tool list reflects model-specific overrides

ToolsListRequest.description: Optional model identifier whose tool overrides should be applied to the listing.
ToolsListRequest.title: ToolsListRequest

minItems.description: Minimum number of items the user must select.

maxItems.description: Maximum number of items the user may select.

items.description: Schema applied to each item in the array.

default.description: Default values selected when the form is first shown.
